/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/core/Bootstrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/core/ContentRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/GridSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/AgentSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/TransportSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/EconomyEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/StarRatingSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/SaveLoadSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/domain/TenantSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/core/EventBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/core/SimClock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/core/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/SDLRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/InputMapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/RenderFrameCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/DebugPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/SpriteSheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TowerTycoon.dir/src/renderer/AnimationSystem.cpp.o -o TowerTycoon  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_image.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_ttf.so libimgui.a _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so
